CREATE TABLE test_bitAnd (a UInt64, b UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
SELECT bitAnd(a, b) AS result FROM test_bitAnd;
SELECT a, b, bitAnd(a, b) AS result FROM test_bitAnd WHERE a < 10;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT bitAnd(a, b) AS result FROM test_bitAnd WHERE result = 0);
CREATE TABLE another_table (a UInt64, b UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
SELECT t1.a, t2.b, bitAnd(t1.a, t2.b) AS bitwise_result FROM test_bitAnd t1 JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.a = t2.a;
SELECT bitAnd(a, (SELECT MAX(b) FROM another_table)) AS combined_result FROM test_bitAnd;
SELECT bitAnd((SELECT MAX(a) FROM test_bitAnd), (SELECT MIN(b) FROM another_table)) AS extreme_result;
